other_observers: Van Truan; Could be one of two birds in this plumage found on Dec 15, 2007 (Tony Leukering/Larry Semo) to Jan 06, 2008 (Tony Leukering/Tim Smart) at Pueblo Reservoir. No one had seen a Mew Gull at Pueblo Reservoir between the Jan 06 2008 sighting and this Feb 2
description: A small Ring-billed type gull, thin bill, more brown overall, with darker gray mantle. Dark eyes, round head. Thin pink legs.  See photos (bird swimming in the water and standing on dock). Also, Van Truan's flight photo.Behaviors: Seen on the tires & dock, swimming in the water, and flying around the North Shore Marina at Pueblo Reservoir.Call: nonePlumage: first basic
